judge.rationale: This implementation is a complete failure on every dimension. It does not implement resolve_flags at all — the entry point function is entirely absent. Instead, the code attempts to import a non-existent 'module_' (which will raise ImportError at runtime), then performs bizarre Dafny-compiled-Python symbol aliasing that has nothing to do with the task. It violates every Zen of Python principle: it is implicit, deeply indirect, relies on dynamic namespace mutation, imports wildcard symbols, and provides zero readable logic. There is no dict merging, no segment iteration, no override application — none of the required semantics are present. This is pure architectural slop masquerading as a solution.
